tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Project
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad Penn Station Access Project

payload.description: Project to provide Metro-North Railroad customers with service into and out of Penn Station in New York via the existing Amtrak Hell Gate Line, including four new ADA accessible passenger rail stations in the East Bronx, bridge rehabilitations, and over 19 miles of new and rehabilitated track work

evidence_refs.source_quote: Contract PS21008 ("Contract") is for the services of a consultant to perform Project Management Consultant ("PMC") services to assist C&D in administering, overseeing and ensuring completion of the Penn Station Access Project (the "Project") on schedule and within budget. The Project will provide Metro-North Railroad ("MNR") customers with service into and out of Penn Station in New York via the existing Amtrak Hell Gate Line. The Project includes four new American with Disabilities Act ("ADA") accessible passenger rail stations in the East Bronx, bridge rehabilitations, and over 19 miles of new and rehabilitated track work.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

tool_args.label: Contract PS21008 Performance Incentive
tool_args.raw_text: This Contract incorporates a performance incentive that is applied to the Fee. The incentive provides an opportunity for the consultant to earn additional profit through exemplary performance in managing the Project and a reduction in the fee if its performance requires improvement.

tool_args.label: Early Substantial Completion Incentive
tool_args.raw_text: the Consultant is eligible to earn a lump-sum incentive payment if the Project achieves early substantial completion

payload.claim_text: the Consultant is eligible to earn a lump-sum incentive payment if the Project achieves early substantial completion. Further, the Consultant shall repay a portion of the earned fee for each month that the Project does not achieve timely substantial completion.
payload.description: Contract PS21008 includes early completion bonus and late completion penalty provisions

evidence_refs.source_quote: the Consultant is eligible to earn a lump-sum incentive payment if the Project achieves early substantial completion. Further, the Consultant shall repay a portion of the earned fee for each month that the Project does not achieve timely substantial completion.
